warehouseQuery.query: SELECT DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.SUB_SEGMENT_ID as SUBSEGMENT_ID, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_CODE as ORDER, DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.PREM_CLASS_ID as PREM_CLASS_ID  FROM DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING JOIN DIM_GI_REFERENCE ON DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.MAPPING_ORDER = DIM_GI_REFERENCE.REFERENCE_ID WHERE DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.REC_CLSD_DATE IS NULL AND DIM_GI_REFERENCE.REC_CLSD_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY PREM_CLASS_ID, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_CODE --

SELECT DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_BATCH_TRANS_TYPE as EXCLUDE_BATCH_TRANS_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_MTRN_TYPE as EXCLUDE_MTRN_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_PREM_CLASS as FROM_PREM_CLASS, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TO_AMT_TYPE_DESC as TO_AMT_TYPE_DESC, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.CALCULATION_FACTOR as CALCULATION_FACTOR, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_MTRN_TYPE as FROM_MTRN_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_BUSN_AREA_NAME as FROM_BUSN_AREA_NAME, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TO_GL_AMT_TYPE as TO_GL_AMT_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TRANS_REC_TYPE as TRANS_REC_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_AMT_TYPE_CODE as FROM_AMT_TYPE_CODE FROM DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING WHERE DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_BATCH_TRANS_TYPE='-' AND DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_MTRN_TYPE='-' AND DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_MTRN_TYPE='-' AND DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_PREM_CLASS='-'

SELECT DIM_GI_COMMON_HIERARCHY.TO_REFERENCE_ID as TO_REFERENCE_ID, DIM_GI_COMMON_HIERARCHY.FROM_ITEM_TABLE as FROM_ITEM_TABLE, DIM_GI_COMMON_HIERARCHY.TO_ITEM_TABLE as TO_ITEM_TABLE, DIM_GI_COMMON_HIERARCHY.HIERARCHY_TYPE_ID as HIERARCHY_TYPE_ID, DIM_GI_COMMON_HIERARCHY.FROM_REFERENCE_ID as FROM_REFERENCE_ID FROM DIM_GI_COMMON_HIERARCHY WHERE REC_CLSD_DATE IS NULL

SELECT DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_BATCH_TRANS_TYPE as EXCLUDE_BATCH_TRANS_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_MTRN_TYPE as EXCLUDE_MTRN_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_PREM_CLASS as FROM_PREM_CLASS, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TO_AMT_TYPE_DESC as TO_AMT_TYPE_DESC, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.CALCULATION_FACTOR as CALCULATION_FACTOR, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_BUSN_AREA_NAME as FROM_BUSN_AREA_NAME, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TO_GL_AMT_TYPE as TO_GL_AMT_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TRANS_REC_TYPE as TRANS_REC_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_AMT_TYPE_CODE as FROM_AMT_TYPE_CODE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_MTRN_TYPE as FROM_MTRN_TYPE FROM DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING WHERE  DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_PREM_CLASS='-'

SELECT DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.SUB_SEGMENT_ID as SUBSEGMENT_ID, DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.PRD_ID as PRD_ID, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_CODE AS ORDER FROM DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING JOIN DIM_GI_REFERENCE ON DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.MAPPING_ORDER = DIM_GI_REFERENCE.REFERENCE_ID WHERE DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.REC_CLSD_DATE IS NULL AND DIM_GI_REFERENCE.REC_CLSD_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY PRD_ID, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_CODE --

SELECT DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_BATCH_TRANS_TYPE as EXCLUDE_BATCH_TRANS_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_PREM_CLASS as FROM_PREM_CLASS, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TO_AMT_TYPE_DESC as TO_AMT_TYPE_DESC, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.CALCULATION_FACTOR as CALCULATION_FACTOR, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_MTRN_TYPE as FROM_MTRN_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_BUSN_AREA_NAME as FROM_BUSN_AREA_NAME, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TO_GL_AMT_TYPE as TO_GL_AMT_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TRANS_REC_TYPE as TRANS_REC_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_AMT_TYPE_CODE as FROM_AMT_TYPE_CODE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_MTRN_TYPE as EXCLUDE_MTRN_TYPE  FROM DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING WHERE  DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_MTRN_TYPE != '-'

SELECT DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.SUB_SEGMENT_ID as SUBSEGMENT_ID, DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.BRANCH_ID as BRANCH_ID, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_CODE AS ORDER FROM DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING JOIN DIM_GI_REFERENCE ON DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.MAPPING_ORDER = DIM_GI_REFERENCE.REFERENCE_ID WHERE DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.REC_CLSD_DATE IS NULL AND DIM_GI_REFERENCE.REC_CLSD_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY BRANCH_ID, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_CODE --

SELECT DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_MTRN_TYPE as EXCLUDE_MTRN_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_PREM_CLASS as FROM_PREM_CLASS, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TO_AMT_TYPE_DESC as TO_AMT_TYPE_DESC, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.CALCULATION_FACTOR as CALCULATION_FACTOR, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_MTRN_TYPE as FROM_MTRN_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_BUSN_AREA_NAME as FROM_BUSN_AREA_NAME, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TO_GL_AMT_TYPE as TO_GL_AMT_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TRANS_REC_TYPE as TRANS_REC_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_AMT_TYPE_CODE as FROM_AMT_TYPE_CODE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_BATCH_TRANS_TYPE as EXCLUDE_BATCH_TRANS_TYPE FROM  DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING WHERE  DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_BATCH_TRANS_TYPE != '-'
SELECT DISTINCT DATA_GI_CLAIM_TRANSACTION.CLAIM_ID as CLAIM_ID  FROM  DATA_GI_CLAIM_TRANSACTION WHERE DATA_GI_CLAIM_TRANSACTION.PREM_CLASS_CODE LIKE 'PA_%'

SELECT DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_BATCH_TRANS_TYPE as EXCLUDE_BATCH_TRANS_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_MTRN_TYPE as EXCLUDE_MTRN_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TO_AMT_TYPE_DESC as TO_AMT_TYPE_DESC, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.CALCULATION_FACTOR as CALCULATION_FACTOR, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_MTRN_TYPE as FROM_MTRN_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_BUSN_AREA_NAME as FROM_BUSN_AREA_NAME, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TO_GL_AMT_TYPE as TO_GL_AMT_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TRANS_REC_TYPE as TRANS_REC_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_AMT_TYPE_CODE as FROM_AMT_TYPE_CODE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_PREM_CLASS as FROM_PREM_CLASS FROM DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING WHERE  DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_MTRN_TYPE='-' AND DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_PREM_CLASS='-'

SELECT DIM_GI_REFERENCE.REFERENCE_ID as REFERENCE_ID, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.DISP_ITEM_DESC as DISP_ITEM_DESC, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_SHORT_DESC as ITEM_SHORT_DESC, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_LONG_DESC as ITEM_LONG_DESC, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.BUSN_AREA_NAME as BUSN_AREA_NAME, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_CODE as ITEM_CODE FROM DIM_GI_REFERENCE WHERE ITEM_TABLE='T565' AND CMPY_CODE='-' AND REC_CLSD_DATE IS NULL

SELECT DIM_GI_REFERENCE.REFERENCE_ID as REFERENCE_ID, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.DISP_ITEM_DESC as DISP_ITEM_DESC, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_SHORT_DESC as ITEM_SHORT_DESC, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_LONG_DESC as ITEM_LONG_DESC, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.BUSN_AREA_NAME as BUSN_AREA_NAME, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_CODE as ITEM_CODE FROM DIM_GI_REFERENCE WHERE ITEM_TABLE='T200' AND CMPY_CODE='-' AND REC_CLSD_DATE IS NULL

SELECT DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.SUB_SEGMENT_ID as SUBSEGMENT_ID, DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.CLIENT_GROUP_ID as CLIENT_GROUP_ID, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_CODE AS ORDER FROM DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING JOIN DIM_GI_REFERENCE ON DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.MAPPING_ORDER = DIM_GI_REFERENCE.REFERENCE_ID WHERE DIM_GI_SEGMENT_MAPPING.REC_CLSD_DATE IS NULL AND DIM_GI_REFERENCE.REC_CLSD_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY CLIENT_GROUP_ID, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_CODE --

SELECT DIM_GI_REFERENCE.REFERENCE_ID as REFERENCE_ID, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.DISP_ITEM_DESC as DISP_ITEM_DESC, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_SHORT_DESC as ITEM_SHORT_DESC, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_LONG_DESC as ITEM_LONG_DESC, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.BUSN_AREA_NAME as BUSN_AREA_NAME, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_CODE as ITEM_CODE FROM DIM_GI_REFERENCE WHERE ITEM_TABLE='T205' AND CMPY_CODE='-' AND REC_CLSD_DATE IS NULL
SELECT * FROM EBIDB_MODEL WHERE (TRANS_ID > (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANS_ID), -1) FROM SDM.DATA_GI_CLAIM_MOVEMENT)) AND CTL_SRC_SYS_SET_NAME <> 'NZA'
SELECT DISTINCT  DATA_GI_CLAIM_TRANSACTION.CLAIM_ID as CLAIM_ID FROM DATA_GI_CLAIM_TRANSACTION WHERE DATA_GI_CLAIM_TRANSACTION.CLAIM_PAYMT_TYPE_CODE = 'PSB'

SELECT DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_BATCH_TRANS_TYPE as EXCLUDE_BATCH_TRANS_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.EXCLUDE_MTRN_TYPE as EXCLUDE_MTRN_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TO_AMT_TYPE_DESC as TO_AMT_TYPE_DESC, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.CALCULATION_FACTOR as CALCULATION_FACTOR, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_MTRN_TYPE as FROM_MTRN_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_BUSN_AREA_NAME as FROM_BUSN_AREA_NAME, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TO_GL_AMT_TYPE as TO_GL_AMT_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.TRANS_REC_TYPE as TRANS_REC_TYPE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_AMT_TYPE_CODE as FROM_AMT_TYPE_CODE, DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_PREM_CLASS as FROM_PREM_CLASS FROM DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING WHERE  DIM_GI_CLAIM_AMOUNT_TYPE_MAPPING.FROM_MTRN_TYPE='-'

SELECT DIM_GI_REFERENCE.REFERENCE_ID as REFERENCE_ID, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.DISP_ITEM_DESC as DISP_ITEM_DESC, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_SHORT_DESC as ITEM_SHORT_DESC, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_LONG_DESC as ITEM_LONG_DESC, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.BUSN_AREA_NAME as BUSN_AREA_NAME, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.ITEM_CODE as ITEM_CODE, DIM_GI_REFERENCE.CMPY_CODE as CMPY_CODE FROM DIM_GI_REFERENCE WHERE ITEM_TABLE='T002' AND REC_CLSD_DATE IS NULL
